amendments.text: The shock-absorbing mechanism may not damage the structure of the airplane when the airplane is taxied on the roughest ground that may reasonably be expected in normal operation. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64.
